text: Here's what science actually says about forest plots. Forest plots are visual tools for comparing the results of multiple studies. They show the effect sizes and confidence intervals, almost like a scientific scoreboard. But be cautious—preliminary research can skew these visuals. Understanding forest plots helps us make sense of complex data, guiding better decisions in science. Curious about more science insights? Hit subscribe for more!
